## nsc auth check-login

Return a successful exit code if the caller is still authenticated to Namespace.

```
nsc auth check-login [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --duration duration   Fail if the current session does not last at least this much more time. (default 5m0s)
  -h, --help                help for check-login
```

* [nsc auth](nsc_auth.md)	 - Authentication related operations (e.g. login).
